Updates to OpenAI's Privacy Policy
***************************************************************************************

 Hi Денис Майоров, 

We wanted to let you know that we're updating our  Privacy Policy ( http://url3243.email.openai.com/ls/click?upn=u001.IQLfsj4kk-2BK7JhymNusRMlO-2BNuxxFiPq4chNMg084bhv9bMyv6Wtz77ZvoTEJZ9fxgPVz7lgnHhFzr7Zw28bAI28vfdk1GrNIWSbDGKqGDa02O1tDftGGQlzpZlTeRM3nAqFfxGVFNQfdhmAHFugQGvFsWiXlPUlBXcZVSqUqQT989Dj1qH3-2F80nJEdhLouYPdQYPFV5kUEKKyaM6MOxyrvY-2BRER3jgi7UWFy-2FFwi10-3Dp9S6_1QnDvVxXkBjpBZebjrr8-2B8CHvou-2Frm5QRozFsrfQaMqtyb4BchlGBZcDbLhwoy0ZXVeeM1v-2BDmaUOWzQPX6BpjUoD3IPFBZKZqqn-2BASyLvq4BhTPBdVUY1j1Wp0ACDdubbw55ehP2pk-2FPi5kATWbHZUJvPohHpDGhFe2liqp4GS1Y-2FmG7-2F3jsdRUFf4KC2s0iMMt04yxmpZMlzHVcGACwwLPbn26oNTGSGzxzzhbviVwKiEX8uyo0-2B3b2cK5coifaimxWtn5dC9BRcQF93HVhYLylj4XjlJqFyFAz9yypWMDE5oOEzJ2XExGH8Dz7tLWE51VBu46pU96C589sFDn-2F3AbUvpaZQMk6Uo9p-2B2QguIMbujJUL1XZm7zwJa7CZiCaWy2M25NWrTOZkb-2BCWNVQ2f2xc9N8LtVN9yP2AJW1GBLjfu0sQ3eKwopUT9xar6VQpC7uRhqgloFq8u7OduGs8UQSCZUg-2BMJrzuONKaAA-2BStS7SGlXrrEqG2XZsPiITyiT0hITWJJtrd32B1rpuBEtqi1oj4Qt1tgiTUi8Z9WVe-2BWJICtXEF-2FJrxsnf8fLYYJPeAHxAM9u59GOm47vJP-2B49hb3XklmGylnCqCTJVJW571s4WZ3YBIpOxkLstPIwoykS0PIwRVhTosufVSzmLL-2FA8RDPcBMp6xI3yUlbeR6P-2F3O25kjZkN-2Bxns3HuPXTZi-2FgnxW1gT4b-2BXMwUqSD5MMSEcUs6wa1zi-2BeXz-2F8ysl8-3D )  to give you even more information about what data we collect, how we use it, and how you can control it.

Here’s what’s changing:

*Finding friends on OpenAI services*
You can now choose to sync your contacts to see who else is using our services. This is completely optional.

*Age prediction & safeguards for teens*
In the coming weeks, we’ll begin using age prediction across our services to help provide safer, more age-appropriate experiences for teens. Learn more. ( http://url3243.email.openai.com/ls/click?upn=u001.IQLfsj4kk-2BK7JhymNusRMmfwoG2v3nTgHW39-2Fobue0t0vcTbzB4UaYnTH848MYAx0uBHqc7KCvxuSdmam158S50eF9JHaMMX-2BiZBvlAXa2n9smD83n1dqGe-2BJSrtomuhJEFktCZXTrsjmrn4hFHjliI2-2Brw3ICuYf09jNnBdbCf-2Fxv359iKyUGhiFjGcUWwr3XJ8vzoY2ugyTXp7UtI5rYbfcrSw-2BcFaygJjChHodFYQbpLX0VPQibNrGliG5UIYdDCg_1QnDvVxXkBjpBZebjrr8-2B8CHvou-2Frm5QRozFsrfQaMqtyb4BchlGBZcDbLhwoy0ZXVeeM1v-2BDmaUOWzQPX6BpjUoD3IPFBZKZqqn-2BASyLvq4BhTPBdVUY1j1Wp0ACDdubbw55ehP2pk-2FPi5kATWbHZUJvPohHpDGhFe2liqp4GS1Y-2FmG7-2F3jsdRUFf4KC2s0iMMt04yxmpZMlzHVcGACwwLPbn26oNTGSGzxzzhbviVwKiEX8uyo0-2B3b2cK5coifaimxWtn5dC9BRcQF93HVhYLylj4XjlJqFyFAz9yypWMDE5oOEzJ2XExGH8Dz7tLWE51VBu46pU96C589sFDn-2F3AbUvpaZQMk6Uo9p-2B2QguIMbujJUL1XZm7zwJa7CZiCaWy2M25NWrTOZkb-2BCWNVQ2f2xc9N8LtVN9yP2AJW1GBLjfu0sQ3eKwopUT9xar6VQpC7uRhqgloFq8u7OduGs8UQSCZUg-2BMJrzuONKaAA-2BStS7SGlXrrEqG2XZsPiITyiT0hITWJJtrd32B1rpuBEtqi1oj4Qt1tgiTUi8Z9WVe-2BWJICtXEF-2FJrxsnf8fLYYJPeAHxAM9u59GOm47vJP-2B7D9liFltEnjD2g-2FEMlROe3MzwQ8LyDiuiABcrPUlp-2BOs4ntgdmWT4WOI7lK-2FXbB-2FHBQ0lNNGAQclQnPgZUAl9qXQjhOezbvWYk8aA-2BGfFC5oq94MKkNf8rMrmQ6gtDPC9bH2gzgZEUMFfoRUaq0sPo-3D )

What we’ve clarified:

*New tools and features*
We’ve added details about Atlas, parental controls for teen accounts, and other upcoming features such as Sora 2.

*More transparency around data*
We explain how long we keep data, your controls, and the legal bases we rely on when processing your personal data.

You can review and manage your data preferences anytime in your account settings.

Thanks,
The OpenAI Team
